subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Call thou to remembrance when thou didst leave thy habitation, yearning for the presence of God, the Lord of all worlds, and didst traverse the land [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد ان اذکر اذ خرجت من مقرک شوقا للقاء الله رب العالمین و قطعت البر و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @wisdom [hikmat]
